name: agent-native-patent-artifact
description: Agent-Native Patent Artifact (APA) - a full-stack, agent-native tool that automates the patent-prep lifecycle. Phase-1 MVP: capture/compile into a machine-executable patent artifact, mechanically validate it, view it, and guard confidentiality. Human-in-the-loop; not legal advice.

scripts.build: node scripts/gen-skill-docs.mjs && node scripts/gen-skill-docs.mjs --check && node scripts/check-syntax.mjs && node --test "packages/**/*.test.mjs" "lib/**/*.test.mjs" "scripts/**/*.test.mjs" "hosts/**/*.test.mjs" "test/**/*.test.mjs" && node scripts/smoke.mjs
